rows.label: tev072201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Run'tonam if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Since the distant past, we weak-bodied
Orphe have been guided by our Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0002
rows.name:
We evaded enemies, evolved, and
survived to the present day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0003
rows.name:
I know this merely by feeling
that which flows through this
body of mine as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0004
rows.name:
But at times I wonder if it will
truly lead us to the correct path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0005
rows.name:
It is not true of us all, but
apparently some betaforms
harbor doubts about the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ever since I was split off from
On'tonam, I have felt an overpowering
sensation of being...out of place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I do not understand its source, and I
feel strongly that so long as I continue
on the way I have, I never will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072201_MSG0012
rows.name:
My Ovah provides me no insight, and
none of the other Orpheans I've
spoken to understand my plight.[ST:wait ]
